params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: date.from
params.description: Start of the date range filter. Accepts ISO 8601 datetime strings or relative values like "24" (last 24 hours) or "now".

params.name: date.to
params.description: End of the date range filter. Accepts ISO 8601 datetime strings or relative values like "now".

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of records to skip for pagination.

params.name: resourceTypes
params.description: Comma-separated list of resource types to filter by (e.g., "order,product,customer").

params.name: changes
params.description: Filter by specific change type name (e.g., "setCustomField", "changeOrderState").

params.name: resourceId
params.description: Filter records to changes affecting a specific resource ID.

params.name: userId
params.description: Filter records to changes made by a specific user ID.

params.name: clientId
params.description: Filter records to changes made by a specific API client ID.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of change history records for the project. Each record contains a list of individual changes along with metadata about the actor and timestamp. Supports filtering by resource type, date range, resource ID, user, and client.

info.name: Query change history for a specific resource

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: resourceType
params.description: The resource type category to filter the change history query.

params.name: id
params.description: The system-generated ID of the specific resource.

params.name: date.from
params.description: Start of the date range filter.

params.name: date.to
params.description: End of the date range filter.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of records to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of change history records filtered to a specific resource type and resource ID. This is the most efficient way to retrieve the full change history of a single resource, such as all changes made to a specific order or product.
